confirm.description: Optional confirm-password value. When provided, the equality rule is enabled by default

policy.description: Built-in rules. All keys are optional — only enabled rules appear in the UI: { minLength?, maxLength?, minLowercase?, minUppercase?, minDigits?, minSymbols?, allowedSymbols?, forbidWhitespace?, maxConsecutiveRepeat?, maxConsecutiveSequence?, requireMatch?, onlyAlphaNumeric?, numericOnly?, customCharSet? }

customRules.type: Array<{ id, label, test(value, confirm?), hint? }>
customRules.description: Additional rules merged below the built-in ones

labels.description: Override the wording of any built-in or custom rule by id

showStrengthMeter.description: Render the bundled PasswordStrengthMeter below the checklist

iconStyle.description: Visual treatment of the satisfied state

hideOnMet.description: Collapse satisfied rules out of view (still announced once for SR)

onChange.description: Fires when any rule's met state changes
